---
title: "Customization"
---

## Container classes

Classes applied to the `.circle-flow` div.

| Class | Description |
|---|---|
| `circle-flow` | Required. Marks the container. |
| `node-circle` | (default) Circular nodes. |
| `node-box` | Rounded rectangle nodes. |
| `node-none` | Text-only, no node background. |
| `arrow-chevron` | (default) Filled chevron arrows. |
| `arrow-curved` | Filled SVG arc arrows. |
| `arrow-thin` | Thin SVG lines with arrowheads. |
| `arrow-ring` | Single ring circle behind nodes. |
| `arrow-arc` | Single filled clockwise arc. |
| `arrow-double` | Thin lines, arrowheads both ends. |

## Container attributes

| Attribute | Description |
|---|---|
| `data-node-color` | Color for all nodes (default `#2e6b8a`). |
| `data-arrow-color` | Color for all arrows (default `#2e6b8a`). |

## Item attributes

| Attribute | Description |
|---|---|
| `data-color` | Overrides node color for this item only. |

## Sizing behavior

Node size and layout radius are computed from `n` (number of items). The gap between neighboring circle edges equals `nodeRadius`. The formula is:

```
nodeRadius = (2/3) · layoutR · sin(π/n)
layoutR + nodeRadius ≤ 240
```

For `n=1`: `layoutR=0`, `nodeRadius=240` (fills the container).

Font size is scaled using canvas `measureText` so the longest label fills the node without overflow. For `node-none`, the label width is capped at 80px.
